"'''Gilded Rebellion'''" was a planned [[West End Games]] adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Set in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], it would have covered the aftermath of that sector's annexation by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and opportunities for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebellion]] among the Tapani nobility in the Empire's final days.
